title: Nmanne
compiled_truth: Nmanne is an external contact at [Susmangodfrey](companies/susmangodfrey). Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (14), [Jross](people/jross-susmangodfrey) (10), [Rrivera](people/rrivera-susmangodfrey) (10), [Sraymond](people/sraymond-susmangodfrey) (7), [Jeffrey T Hodge](people/jeffrey-t-hodge) (5).
